schemas.description: Large security operations schema with assets, detections, alerts, incidents, auth events, vulnerabilities, and patching.
Marketplace commerce schema with sellers, products, orders, payments, shipments, and returns.
Edtech platform schema with organizations, courses, enrollments, lessons, assessments, and attempts.
Consumer lending schema with borrowers, applications, loans, repayments, and card transactions.
Clinic network schema with patients, providers, appointments, claims, diagnoses, prescriptions, and labs.
Hotel operations schema with properties, rooms, reservations, folios, and housekeeping.
Hiring and people operations schema with openings, candidates, interviews, offers, and hires.
Warehouse and fleet operations schema with routes, shipments, packages, carriers, and delivery events.
Large manufacturing schema with plants, work orders, BOMs, suppliers, purchase orders, inventory, shipments, and quality checks.
Marketing performance schema with campaigns, ad groups, spend, leads, and conversions.
Brokerage schema with agents, clients, properties, listings, showings, offers, and closings.
